topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Grafana analytics on financegnome.omniflow.cc show non-empty cashflow, portfolio crypto, forecast, subscriptions, and plausible budget MTD after sync; root README stays current for devs and users as US/BUG close.

grafana/provisioning dashboards; /analytics/grafana proxy; wealth FX pricing; exchange crypto sync; forecast recompute post US-0015; budgets SQL; root README.md Product status; release and refresh-context hooks.

Post US-0015 deploy may need BACKEND_FRONTEND_DEPLOY + full sync + recompute; BUG-0009/0010 DONE — treat as regression not reopen; MetaMask console noise out of scope; no host .env secrets; US-0016 README exists — enhancement only.

POST /analytics/grafana/api/ds/query 200 without Failed to fetch; representative panels non-empty on omniflow; crypto totals match exchange sync; budgets MTD sane; validate_doc_profile PASS; README Product status includes US-0015.
Operator confirms analytics populated and README living-doc contract holds; BUG-0013 + US-0017 acceptance checked; OIDC regression pass.

decomposition.rationale: Operator bundled independent concerns: (1) P0 omniflow analytics data-pipeline regression cluster with six sub-defects; (2) P2 README living-doc enhancement beyond US-0016 DONE baseline. Vertical split preserves independent user value and testability.
decomposition.split_axis: user-value boundary (defect remediation vs documentation upkeep)

boundaries.BUG-0013: Grafana panels, wealth/crypto/FX pipeline, forecast zeros, budgets MTD SQL, ds/query proxy — data correctness on omniflow
boundaries.US-0017: Root README Examples/Limitations/Troubleshooting expansion + release-gate maintenance hook — no analytics code

alternatives_considered: Single mega-bug — rejected (README is enhancement not defect; mixes doc and data surfaces)
Reopen BUG-0009/0010 — rejected (DONE without closure-evidence to reopen; operator report is post-US-0015 regression)
Skip US-0017 — rejected (operator explicitly requests hold README up-to-date while solving US/Bugs; US-0016 shipped baseline only)
decomposition.bug_routing_guard: INTAKE_BUG_ROUTING_OK kind=story exit=0 — dual allocation BUG-0013 + US-0017 per operator decomposition
